---
title: Working with data
format: 
  live-html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    css: ../styling/styles.css
    theme:
      light: cosmo
      dark: [darkly, ../styling/theme-dark.scss]
    respect-user-color-scheme: true

pyodide:
  packages:
    - pandas
    - openpyxl
---

## Disorder in the lab

Due to an earthquake all the labels fell off the samples in the lab, so noone knows 
what type of cells each sample contains. What you do know is that each sample only contains 
one cell type and that they were all from the human 

Due to an unfortunate mishap it was forgotten what type of cell a certain set of measurements came from. To try figure it out you have measured the sizes of the cells .... 

(Exercise idea...)
